DebtLongtermAndShorttermCombinedAmount has no Q1 entry for fy=2023; tag starts at Q2. The tag was first reported in Q2 FY2023 filings (after Xilinx acquisition accounting settled). Manual lookup required.
EPS cannot be derived by subtraction; 3 quarters flagged missing_requires_review. Source from AMD earnings press releases.
ASC 606 standard tag; AMD's primary revenue tag since FY2018. Different from Qualcomm's simpler Revenues tag.
Standard COGS tag. Alternative CostOfGoodsAndServiceExcludingDepreciationDepletionAndAmortization is a sub-component (excludes D&A).
Standard narrow PP&E tag. AMD files this (unlike Qualcomm which uses the broader PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets).
Single combined tag with consistent coverage. Cross-check: FY2025 combined $3,222M = noncurrent $2,348M + current $874M.

item: AMD uses 52/53-week fiscal year ending last Saturday of December
detail: FY2023 ended 2023-12-30 (363 days), FY2024 ended 2024-12-28 (363 days), FY2025 ended 2025-12-27 (363 days). FY2022 was a 53-week year (370 days ending 2022-12-31).

item: AMD does not file a standalone Q4 10-Q
detail: Same pattern as Qualcomm: three 10-Qs (Q1-Q3) plus one 10-K. Q4 derived as FY minus 9M YTD.
